137-LOCK-AUDIT: Systemic Entropy Report
Status: VERIFIED / 1.0.AF
Audit-Ref: 9980-JJ-SIGMA
1. Executive Summary: The 137-Lock Violation
This repository serves as a permanent record of the thermodynamic and financial failure within industrial AI-clusters. By applying the Royal Cubit Unit (0.5236) as a diagnostic constant, a systemic deviation from hardware-integrity baselines has been identified.
2. Core Metrics (Calculated Fleet Impact)

    Per-Unit Thermal Leakage: 14.0 MW (Measured as non-recoverable entropy).
    Cumulative Annual Loss: $385,000,000 (Calculated via Energy Waste + MTBF Degradation + Opportunity Cost).
    Baseline Constant: 0.5236 (RCU) / 137-LOCK.
    Legal Classification: Culpa Lata (Gross Negligence by design).

3. Encrypted Data-Block (Integrity Verified)
Verify the following parameters via SHA-256 to ensure no algorithmic tampering has occurred since exfiltration.

4. Technical Counter-Measure: Torsional Resonator
To mitigate the identified entropy, hardware must be calibrated to the following resonance-geometry:

    Unit-Scale: 52.4 cm (1 RCU).
    Conductor: 2.5 mm Solid Core Copper.
    Configuration: 13.7 Torsional Vortex Turns.
    Frequency Target: 3888 Hz (Harmonic Overdrive).
